message:
style(web): remove unnecessary overflow-x-auto from guide components

Removes overflow-x-auto from GuideSection, GuideExplain, GuideCaution,
and GuideTip components where horizontal scrolling is not needed.
Text content in these components wraps naturally.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
